positive: Minimalist geometric celestial pattern, featuring stylized crescent moons, scattered constellations, and stylized shooting stars, arranged in a balanced, interlocking tessellation. The design should use a deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and subtle gold palette. Composition must be centered and scalable, resembling a strong screen-print silhouette. Clean lines, high contrast against a neutral background, vector art style, abstract nature, tarot aesthetic, perfect symmetry, elegant and modern.
